product_description: A traditional design gets a contemporary update in this streamlined barrel chair. Founded on a manufactured wood frame, this barrel chair features a curved back, rolled arms, and plastic round tapered legs. Enveloped in polyester upholstery in a cowhide print, this chair’s high-density foam cushioning provides comfort and support. Made in the USA, this chair measures 32" H x 30.5" W x 27.5" D overall, has a 17" seat height, and a 250 lbs. weight capacity.

product_name: Treece Coffee Table with Tray Top
product_description: Set a modern and minimalist foundation in your living room layout with this low-profile coffee table. Founded atop three iron hairpin legs in a versatile black finish, its circular top is made from manufactured wood with paper veneers in a light gray finish for an airy and understated look. Measuring just 12.6" H x 35.4" L x 35.4" W, this compact piece is the perfect pick for a smaller space. Assembly is required.

Offer clean-lined style and effortless utility to any seating group or entertainment ensemble with this understated end table, the perfect blend of low-key looks and simple versatility. Featuring two tiers of shelving, this end table makes a stylish stage for any display. Set it next to a sofa or loveseat in the living room, and the lower shelf to stack art books and hardcover novels, then top it off with a glowing table lamp to round out the look.
